theme_and_archetype.description: Strictly black and white, extreme minimalism, raw wireframe-inspired aesthetic echoing Linear and Raycast. Focus on density, clarity, and bold typography. No gradients, no color accents.

layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat Solid (Pitch Black) with 1px solid white/10 borders. No glassmorphism, no drop shadows. Strictly brutalist clarity.

assistant_home.description: The core of the app. A massive centered white record button. Above it, the live transcription text in massive Cabinet Grotesk font.
assistant_home.record_button: w-24 h-24 sm:w-32 sm:h-32 rounded-full bg-white text-black flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95 transition-transform
assistant_home.visualizer: Use stark geometric CSS animations (1px white lines expanding/contracting) rather than liquid gradients. Keep it architectural.

memory_section.layout: List layout. Cardless. Each item has a 1px solid bottom border (border-white/10).

todo_section.checkbox: w-6 h-6 border border-white/20 rounded-sm flex items-center justify-center data-[state=checked]:bg-white data-[state=checked]:text-black transition-all

permissions_onboarding.layout: Full screen modal layout. Center aligned content.
permissions_onboarding.heading: Massive text 'We need access.'
permissions_onboarding.action_button: w-full bg-white text-black py-4 rounded-full font-bold text-lg text-center active:bg-white/90

bottom_navigation.style: Floating pill at the bottom or a stark black bottom bar. 1px border top (border-white/10).
bottom_navigation.icons: lucide-react icons, stroke-width 1.5. Active tab is pure white. Inactive is white/40. No text labels.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Instant or very subtle fade. Minimal motion to feel like a high-performance tool.

accessibility.contrast: Strictly adheres to maximum contrast (Black and White).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

media_and_images.strategy: No raster images. Pure UI. If an empty state requires an illustration, use an ASCII art graphic or a geometric SVG path.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: pure black, pure white, and opacity levels of white (e.g. white/10, white/60). NO OTHER COLORS ALLOWED.

Implement the UI using Tailwind CSS utility classes. Since the environment specifies mobile_web_app (Expo React Native Android), if you are building actual React Native code, map these Tailwind concepts to NativeWind or StyleSheet (e.g., bg-black -> backgroundColor: '#000', text-white -> color: '#FFF'). If building for web, use Tailwind directly.
For the Assistant screen, the record button must be the primary focal point. The real-time transcription should appear immediately above it.
The Memory and To-Do lists must be cardless. Rely on generous padding and thin 1px white/10 borders to separate items.
Ensure the bottom navigation feels native: either a floating pill with a blur (if achievable in pure black and white) or a solid black bar with a top border.
Add 'data-testid' to every button, link, and input as required.
For the background process requirements, ensure the UI accurately reflects background states without adding color indicators (use text or stark shape changes instead).
